excerpt: The stock market gained 0.9% this week, with energy stocks rising and basic materials declining. Five9 and Bloom Energy led gains, while Roblox and Wingstop suffered significant losses. The S&P 500 is down 6.9% year to date.

content.introduction: The stock market gained 0.9% this week, with energy stocks rising and basic materials declining. Five9 and Bloom Energy led gains, while Roblox and Wingstop suffered significant losses. The S&P 500 is down 6.9% year to date.
body: Five9 and Bloom Energy were among the week’s best stocks, while Roblox and Wingstop posted big losses. ## Stock Market Update for the Trading Week Ended May 1.
